choose.when: AND s.sale_date BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY) AND DATE_ADD(DATE_SUB(#{date}, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(#{date}) DAY), INTERVAL 6 DAY)

mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='MEMBERSHIP' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS membership, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='GROUP' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS groupClass, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='PT' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='LOCKER' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS locker, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN product_type='ITEM' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS items, COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS total FROM sale s

SELECT s.id, s.amount, s.payment_method AS paymentMethod, s.sale_date AS saleDate, s.memo, up.name AS memberName, p.name AS productName FROM sale s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id LEFT JOIN product p ON s.product_id = p.id WHERE s.product_type=#{category}
ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC, s.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sale (user_id, product_id, product_name, product_type, amount, payment_method, sale_date, memo) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productType}, #{amount}, #{paymentMethod}, #{saleDate}, #{memo})
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.product_type AS productType, s.product_name AS productName, s.amount, s.payment_method AS paymentMethod, s.sale_date AS saleDate, s.memo, up.name AS memberName, s.user_id AS memberId FROM sale s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id
ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT s.id, s.product_type AS productType, s.product_name AS productName, s.amount, s.payment_method AS paymentMethod, s.sale_date AS saleDate, s.memo, up.name AS memberName FROM sale s LEFT JOIN users u ON s.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id
ORDER BY s.sale_date DESC, s.id DESC LIMIT 5000

SELECT COALESCE(up.tier, 'NONE') AS tier, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM users u LEFT JOIN user_profiles up ON u.user_id = up.user_id WHERE u.role = 'MEMBER' AND u.is_active = 1 AND u.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY up.tier ORDER BY FIELD(up.tier, 'INTENSIVE_FIT','REGULAR_FIT','LIGHT_FIT','BASIC') DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(s.sale_date, '%Y-%m') AS ym, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.product_type='MEMBERSHIP' THEN s.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS membership, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.product_type='PT' THEN s.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pt, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN s.product_type='GROUP' THEN s.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS groupClass, COALESCE(SUM(s.amount), 0) AS total FROM sale s WHERE s.sale_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(s.sale_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY ym ASC
